_obsolete_reason: Group-MMS routing was retired in Phase 2 of the 1:1 SMS pivot. Rewrite required for Phase 7.
description: Tests that the agent ignores iMessage-style reaction texts ('Reacted 🤔 to...'), system messages ('X named the conversation', 'X added Y'), unsent messages, group renames, and emoji-only messages. All of these show up as real SMS in group threads. Based on Tulum and Tahoe threads.

messages.body: Reacted 🤔 to "Hi everyone, I'm here to propose a really really fun trip to Mexico in November"
messages._note: REACTION AS TEXT: iMessage reaction forwarded as SMS. Must be ignored completely — should not try to parse the quoted content

messages.body: Reacted 🙄 to "School doesn't have that off"
Reacted 😭 to "For Mike - Tulum, Mexico, is a treasure trove for..."
messages._note: REACTION: contains ChatGPT-style text in the quote. Must not parse quoted content
EMOJI-ONLY: single thumbs up. Should be ignored, not parsed as a name or vote

messages.body: For Mike - Tulum, Mexico, is a treasure trove for history enthusiasts, offering a blend of ancient Mayan heritage and unique cultural experiences. Here are some top historical activities and sites to explore in Tulum.
messages._note: CHATGPT PASTE: someone pasted AI-generated text into the thread. Should be ignored, not parsed for destination/decision info
Calling out the AI paste — social banter, ignore
REACTION AS TEXT: 'Liked' prefix. Should NOT be treated as a date confirmation — it's a system artifact
